member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLX3DSettingsServicesHelper
member.summary: Wrapper over IADLX3DSettingsServices selecting the highest available interface and exposing change handling.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLX3DSettingsServicesHelper.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLX3DSettingsServices*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a 3D settings helper from the native services interface, upgrading to v1/v2 when available.
member.param: True to AddRef the pointer for this helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLX3DSettingsServicesHelper.Get3DSettingsServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the highest available 3D settings services interface.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLX3DSettingsServicesHelper.Get3DSettingsChangedHandlingNative
member.summary: Gets the 3D settings change handling interface (native). Cached after first query.
member.returns: Native 3D settings change handling pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLX3DSettingsServicesHelper.TryGet3DSettingsChangedHandlingNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLX3DSettingsChangedHandling*@)
member.summary: Tries to get 3D settings change handling; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLX3DSettingsServicesHelper.Add3DSettingsEventListener(ADLXWrapper.ThreeDSettingsListenerHandle.ThreeDSettingsChangedCallback)
member.summary: Adds a 3D settings change listener.
member.returns: Listener handle that must be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLX3DSettingsServicesHelper.TryGetAll3DSettings(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.All3DSettingsInfo@)
member.summary: Tries to get all 3D settings; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLX3DSettingsServicesHelper.ApplyAll3DSettings(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.All3DSettingsInfo)
member.summary: Applies all provided 3D settings to a GPU (only non-null fields are applied).

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLX3DSettingsServicesHelper.TryApplyAll3DSettings(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.All3DSettingsInfo)
member.summary: Tries to apply all provided 3D settings; returns false when the feature set is unsupported.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.All3DSettingsInfo
member.summary: Represents a complete snapshot of all 3D settings for a GPU.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ThreeDSettingsListenerHandle
member.summary: Safe handle for an unmanaged IADLX3DSettingsChangedListener backed by a managed delegate. Callbacks arrive on ADLX threads; the handle roots the delegate until disposed or explicitly removed.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXException
member.summary: Exception thrown when an ADLX API call fails

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXException.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.ADLX_RESULT,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new exception for a failed ADLX call.
member.param: The ADLX result code returned by the native call.
Optional message to include; if omitted a default message is used.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXException.IsNotInitializedError
member.summary: Checks if this exception is due to ADLX not being initialized

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXException.IsAlreadyInitializedError
member.summary: Checks if this exception is due to already being initialized

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXException.IsGPUInactiveError
member.summary: Checks if this exception is due to GPU being inactive

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper
member.summary: Main ADLX API wrapper providing safe access to AMD ADLX Library Implements IDisposable for proper resource cleanup

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.Initialize
member.summary: Initialize the ADLX API with default settings

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.InitializeWithCallerAdl(System.IntPtr,System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Initialize ADLX with an existing ADL context (for applications migrating from ADL)

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.GetFullVersion
member.summary: Get the ADLX full version number

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.GetVersion
member.summary: Get the ADLX version string

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.GetSystemServicesNative
member.summary: Get the system services native pointer (lifetime owned by this API helper). Callers must not Release() it directly.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.GetSystemServicesHandle
member.summary: Get the system services as an AdlxInterfaceHandle (AddRef'd for caller ownership).

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.GetSystemServices
member.summary: Get the system services wrapped in an ADLXSystemServicesHelper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose pattern implementation

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizer

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.LoadADLXDll
member.summary: Load the ADLX DLL dynamically

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.ThrowIfDisposed
member.summary: Throw if object has been disposed

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXApiHelper.IsADLXDllAvailable(System.String@)
member.summary: Check if the ADLX DLL is available in the DLL search path
member.param: Details about why the DLL could not be loaded
member.returns: True if DLL can be loaded, false otherwise

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktop
member.summary: Flattened desktop façade with identity metadata and display enumeration helpers.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktop.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDesktopServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDesktop*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*)
member.summary: Creates a managed desktop facade from native desktop and services (optionally with display services for ownership queries).
member.param: Optional display services pointer used for display queries.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktop.EnumerateDisplayInfosForDesktop
member.summary: Managed enumeration of display identities on this desktop.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktop.EnumerateDisplaysForDesktop
member.summary: Façade enumeration of displays on this desktop (pointer-free).

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktop.AddDesktopListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DesktopListListenerHandle.OnDesktopListChanged)
member.summary: Subscribe to desktop list change events. Returns a handle the caller can dispose (or pass to remove) to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktop.GetEyefinityGridSize
member.summary: Eyefinity grid size (rows, columns) for Eyefinity desktops.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktop.EnumerateEyefinityDisplayInfosForDesktop
member.summary: Enumerate displays that compose this Eyefinity desktop.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktop.GetGPU
member.summary: GPU that drives this desktop (first GPU owning any display on the desktop).

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktop.GetDisplayListNative
member.summary: Native display list accessor. Caller must dispose returned ComPtr and any retained items.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper
member.summary: Wrapper over IADLXDesktopServices providing managed/native accessors and Eyefinity helpers.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDesktopServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a desktop services helper from native desktop/display services.
member.param: Optional display services pointer used to build display facades.
True to AddRef the desktop services pointer.
True to AddRef the display services pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.GetDesktopServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the desktop services interface for external ownership.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.EnumerateDesktops
member.summary: Enumerates desktop DTOs (native data marshaled to managed structs).
member.returns: List of desktop info records.
member.exception: If enumeration is unsupported or fails.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.EnumerateADLXDesktops
member.summary: Enumerates managed desktop facades. Callers must dispose each desktop.
member.returns: List of desktop facades.
member.exception: If enumeration is unsupported or fails.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.EnumerateADLXDesktopsForGpu(System.Int32)
member.summary: Enumerates managed desktop facades filtered by GPU unique ID. Callers must dispose each desktop.
member.param: GPU unique ID to filter on.
member.returns: List of desktop facades for the GPU.
member.exception: If enumeration is unsupported or fails.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.CreateADLXDesktop(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDesktop*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wraps a native desktop pointer in a managed facade.
member.param: True to AddRef the pointer for this facade.
member.returns: Managed desktop facade.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.CreateEyefinityDesktop
member.summary: Creates a new Eyefinity desktop using the simple Eyefinity interface.
member.returns: Information about the created Eyefinity desktop.
member.exception: If Eyefinity is unsupported or creation fails.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.DestroyAllEyefinityDesktops
member.summary: Destroys all Eyefinity desktops via the simple Eyefinity interface.
member.exception: If Eyefinity is unsupported or destruction fails.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.AddDesktopListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DesktopListListenerHandle.OnDesktopListChanged)
member.summary: Adds a desktop list change listener.
member.param: Callback invoked when the desktop list changes.
member.returns: Listener handle that must be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.RemoveDesktopListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DesktopListListenerHandle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes a desktop list change listener.
member.param: True to dispose the handle after removal.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.EnumerateDesktopHandles
member.summary: Enumerates native desktop handles (AddRef'd) for advanced/native callers.
member.returns: Array of native desktop handles.
member.exception: If enumeration is unsupported or fails.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDesktopServicesHelper.GetDesktopListNative
member.summary: Returns the native desktop list. Caller must dispose the returned list.
member.returns: Native desktop list pointer.
member.exception: If enumeration is unsupported or fails.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay
member.summary: Flattened display façade with identity metadata, support-guarded feature accessors, and native list exposure.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDesktopServices*)
member.summary: Creates a managed display facade from native display and display services (optional desktop services for ownership queries).
member.param: Optional desktop services pointer used to resolve owning desktop.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetFreeSyncState
member.summary: Query FreeSync support/enabled state.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.SetFreeSync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables FreeSync if supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetGpuScalingState
member.summary: Query GPU scaling support/enabled state.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.SetGpuScaling(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables GPU scaling if supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetScalingMode
member.summary: Query scaling mode support/value.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.SetScalingMode(ADLXWrapper.ADLX_SCALE_MODE)
member.summary: Sets the display scaling mode if supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.EnumerateCustomResolutions
member.summary: Enumerate custom resolutions as managed DTOs.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetCustomResolutionListNative
member.summary: Native custom resolution list accessor. Caller must dispose the returned ComPtr and any retained items.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.ApplyCustomResolution(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayCustomResolution*,ADLXWrapper.DisplayResolutionInfo)
member.summary: Applies a custom resolution using a provided native custom resolution interface.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.TryApplyCustomResolution(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayCustomResolution*,ADLXWrapper.DisplayResolutionInfo)
member.summary: Tries to apply a custom resolution; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetVirtualSuperResolutionState
member.summary: Virtual Super Resolution support/enabled state.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetIntegerScalingState
member.summary: Integer scaling support/enabled state.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetHdcpState
member.summary: HDCP support/enabled state.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetVariBrightState
member.summary: Vari-Bright support/enabled/mode state.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetColorDepthState
member.summary: Color depth support/value.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetPixelFormatState
member.summary: Pixel format support/value.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetCustomColor
member.summary: Custom color info and application.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetGamma
member.summary: Gamma info and reapply.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetGamut
member.summary: Gamut info and reapply.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetThreeDLut
member.summary: 3DLUT info and reapply.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetConnectivityExperience
member.summary: Display connectivity experience info and application.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetDisplayBlankingState
member.summary: Display blanking support/state.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetFreeSyncColorAccuracyState
member.summary: FreeSync Color Accuracy support/enabled state.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetDynamicRefreshRateControlState
member.summary: Dynamic Refresh Rate Control support/enabled state.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.AddDisplaySettingsEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplaySettingsListenerHandle.OnDisplaySettingsChanged)
member.summary: Subscribe to display settings change events. Returns a handle the caller must dispose (or call the remove helper) to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.AddDisplayGammaEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayGammaListenerHandle.OnDisplayGammaChanged)
member.summary: Subscribe to gamma change events.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.AddDisplayGamutEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayGamutListenerHandle.OnDisplayGamutChanged)
member.summary: Subscribe to gamut change events.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.AddDisplay3dLutEventListener(ADLXWrapper.Display3DLutListenerHandle.OnDisplay3DLutChanged)
member.summary: Subscribe to 3DLUT change events.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.AddDisplayListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayListListenerHandle.OnDisplayListChanged)
member.summary: Subscribe to display list change events.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetGPU
member.summary: GPU that drives this display.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetDesktop
member.summary: Desktop that contains this display (requires desktop services supplied to the display instance).

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay.GetDesktopInfo
member.summary: Desktop identity that contains this display (requires desktop services supplied to the display instance).

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper
member.summary: Wrapper over IADLXDisplayServices that provides cached accessors and managed/native enumeration helpers.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDesktopServices*,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a display services helper from native display/desktop services.
member.param: Optional desktop services pointer used to build display facades.
True to AddRef the display services pointer for this helper.
True to AddRef the desktop services pointer for this helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.GetDisplayServicesNative
member.summary: Returns the highest available display services interface (3, then 2, then base). Caller must not release it.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.GetDisplayServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the current display services interface.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.EnumerateDisplays
member.summary: Enumerates managed display facades. Caller must dispose each display.
member.exception: If display services are unsupported or enumeration fails.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.TryEnumerateDisplays(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplay}@)
member.summary: Tries to enumerate display facades, returning false if the feature is not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.GetDisplayInfo(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*)
member.summary: Builds a display DTO from a native display pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.EnumerateADLXDisplaysForGpu(System.Int32)
member.summary: Enumerates managed displays filtered by owning GPU unique ID. Disposes non-matching displays.
member.param: GPU unique ID to filter on.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.CreateADLXDisplay(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wraps a native display pointer in a managed facade.
member.param: True to AddRef the pointer for this facade.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.GetDisplayListNative
member.summary: Returns the native display list. Caller must dispose the returned list.
member.exception: If display services are unsupported or enumeration fails.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.EnumerateDisplayHandles
member.summary: Enumerates display handles (AddRef'd) for native consumption.
member.exception: If display services are unsupported or enumeration fails.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.TryEnumerateDisplayHandles(ADLXWrapper.AdlxInterfaceHandle[]@)
member.summary: Tries to enumerate display handles; returns false if not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.GetDisplayChangedHandlingNative
member.summary: Gets the display change handling interface, caching the result.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.GetDisplayChangedHandling
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the display change handling interface.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.AddDisplayListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayListListenerHandle.OnDisplayListChanged)
member.summary: Adds a display list change listener.
member.param: Callback invoked when the display list changes.
member.returns: Listener handle that must be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.RemoveDisplayListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayListListenerHandle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes a display list change listener.
member.param: True to dispose the handle after removal.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.AddDisplayGamutEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayGamutListenerHandle.OnDisplayGamutChanged)
member.summary: Adds a display gamut change listener.
member.returns: Listener handle that must be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.RemoveDisplayGamutEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayGamutListenerHandle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes a display gamut change listener.
member.param: True to dispose the handle after removal.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.AddDisplayGammaEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayGammaListenerHandle.OnDisplayGammaChanged)
member.summary: Adds a display gamma change listener.
member.returns: Listener handle that must be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.RemoveDisplayGammaEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayGammaListenerHandle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes a display gamma change listener.
member.param: True to dispose the handle after removal.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.AddDisplay3DLutEventListener(ADLXWrapper.Display3DLutListenerHandle.OnDisplay3DLutChanged)
member.summary: Adds a display 3D LUT change listener.
member.returns: Listener handle that must be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.RemoveDisplay3DLutEventListener(ADLXWrapper.Display3DLutListenerHandle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes a display 3D LUT change listener.
member.param: True to dispose the handle after removal.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.AddDisplaySettingsEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplaySettingsListenerHandle.OnDisplaySettingsChanged)
member.summary: Adds a display settings change listener.
member.param: Callback invoked when display settings change.
member.returns: Listener handle that must be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.RemoveDisplaySettingsEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplaySettingsListenerHandle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes a display settings change listener.
member.param: True to dispose the handle after removal.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.GetGamma(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*)
member.summary: Gets the Gamma settings for a specific display.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.ApplyGamma(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayGamma*,ADLXWrapper.GammaInfo)
member.summary: Applies the settings from a GammaInfo object to the hardware.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.ReapplyGamma(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayGamma*)
member.summary: Reapplies the current Gamma settings.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.GetGamut(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*)
member.summary: Gets the Gamut settings for a specific display.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.ApplyGamut(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayGamut*,ADLXWrapper.GamutInfo)
member.summary: Applies the settings from a GamutInfo object to the hardware.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.ReapplyGamut(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayGamut*)
member.summary: Reapplies the current Gamut settings.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.Get3DLUT(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*)
member.summary: Gets the 3DLUT settings for a specific display.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.Apply3DLUT(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay3DLUT*,ADLXWrapper.ThreeDLUTInfo)
member.summary: Applies the settings from a ThreeDLUTInfo object to the hardware.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.Reapply3DLUT(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay3DLUT*)
member.summary: Reapplies the current 3DLUT settings.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.GetDisplayConnectivityExperience(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*)
member.summary: Gets the Display Connectivity Experience settings for a specific display.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.ApplyDisplayConnectivityExperience(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayConnectivityExperience*,ADLXWrapper.ConnectivityExperienceInfo)
member.summary: Applies the settings from a ConnectivityExperienceInfo object to the hardware.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.SetDisplayConnectivityHDMIQualityDetectionEnabled(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayConnectivityExperience*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the enabled state of HDMI Quality Detection.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.SetDisplayConnectivityRelativePreEmphasis(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayConnectivityExperience*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the relative pre-emphasis for display connectivity.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.SetDisplayConnectivityRelativeVoltageSwing(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayConnectivityExperience*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the relative voltage swing for display connectivity.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.GetCustomResolution(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*)
member.summary: Gets the Custom Resolution settings for a specific display.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.GetCustomResolutionListNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*)
member.summary: Returns the native custom resolution list for a display. Caller must wrap/dispose.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.EnumerateCustomResolutions(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*)
member.summary: Enumerates custom resolutions for a display.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.ApplyCustomResolution(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayCustomResolution*,ADLXWrapper.DisplayResolutionInfo)
member.summary: Applies a custom resolution.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.SetVariBrightBacklightAdaptiveEnabled(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayVariBright1*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the enabled state of Vari-Bright Backlight Adaptive.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.SetVariBrightBatteryLifeEnabled(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayVariBright1*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the enabled state of Vari-Bright Battery Life.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.GetCustomColor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplay*)
member.summary: Gets the Custom Color settings for a specific display.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXDisplayServicesHelper.DisplaySettingsOps.ApplyCustomColor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayCustomColor*,ADLXWrapper.CustomColorInfo)
member.summary: Applies the settings from a CustomColorInfo object to the hardware.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.DisplayInfo
member.summary: Represents the collected information for a display.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.DisplayListListenerHandle
member.summary: Safe handle for an unmanaged IADLXDisplayListChangedListener backed by a managed delegate.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.DisplaySettingsListenerHandle
member.summary: Safe handle for an unmanaged IADLXDisplaySettingsChangedListener backed by a managed delegate.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPU
member.summary: Flattened GPU façade with identity metadata and topology listeners.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPU.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXDesktopServices*)
member.summary: Creates a managed GPU facade from a native GPU pointer, optionally wiring display/desktop services for topology helpers.
member.param: Optional display services pointer for display enumeration.
Optional desktop services pointer for desktop enumeration.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPU.EnumerateDisplaysForGPU
member.summary: Enumerates managed displays driven by this GPU. Callers must dispose each display.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPU.EnumerateDesktopsForGPU
member.summary: Enumerates managed desktops containing displays from this GPU. Callers must dispose each desktop.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPU.AddDisplayListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayListListenerHandle.OnDisplayListChanged)
member.summary: Subscribe to display list change events. Returns a handle that can be disposed or passed to the remove helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPU.RemoveDisplayListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DisplayListListenerHandle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes a display list change listener.
member.param: True to dispose the handle after removal.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPU.AddDesktopListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DesktopListListenerHandle.OnDesktopListChanged)
member.summary: Subscribe to desktop list change events. Returns a handle that can be disposed or passed to the remove helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPU.RemoveDesktopListEventListener(ADLXWrapper.DesktopListListenerHandle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes a desktop list change listener.
member.param: True to dispose the handle after removal.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPUTuningServicesHelper
member.summary: Wrapper over IADLXGPUTuningServices selecting the highest available interface and exposing change handling helpers.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPUTuningServicesHelper.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPUTuningServices*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a GPU tuning helper from the native services interface, upgrading to v1 when available.
member.param: True to AddRef the pointer for this helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPUTuningServicesHelper.GetGPUTuningServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the highest available GPU tuning services interface.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPUTuningServicesHelper.GetGPUTuningChangedHandlingNative
member.summary: Gets the GPU tuning change handling interface (native). Cached after first query.
member.returns: Native change handling pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPUTuningServicesHelper.AddGPUTuningEventListener(ADLXWrapper.GpuTuningListenerHandle.GpuTuningChangedCallback)
member.summary: Adds a GPU tuning change listener.
member.returns: Listener handle that must be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPUTuningServicesHelper.RemoveGPUTuningEventListener(ADLXWrapper.GpuTuningListenerHandle,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes a GPU tuning change listener.
member.param: True to dispose the handle after removal.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXGPUTuningServicesHelper.TryIsAutoTuningSupported(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Tries to query auto tuning support; returns false when not supported.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.GpuTuningListenerHandle
member.summary: Safe handle for an unmanaged IADLXGPUTuningChangedListener backed by a managed delegate.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXHardwareDetection
member.summary: Hardware detection utilities for AMD GPU presence.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXHardwareDetection.HasAMDGPU(System.String@)
member.summary: Checks if an AMD GPU is present in the system via PCI Vendor ID detection.
member.param: Details about why AMD GPU was not detected.
member.returns: True if AMD GPU hardware is detected, false otherwise.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXHardwareDetection.GetAMDGPUNames
member.summary: Gets detailed information about detected AMD GPUs.
member.returns: Array of GPU names, or empty array if none found.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.AdlxInterfaceHandle
member.summary: Lightweight lifetime wrapper for raw ADLX interface pointers.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.AdlxInterfaceHandle.FromNonRefCounted(System.Void*)
member.summary: Create a non-owning handle for interfaces that are not ref-counted (no Acquire/Release).

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper
member.summary: Wrapper over IADLXMultimediaServices exposing managed/native accessors and change handling.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXMultimediaServices*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a multimedia services helper from the native services interface.
member.param: True to AddRef the pointer for this helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.GetMultimediaServicesNative
member.summary: Returns the native multimedia services interface owned by this helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.GetMultimediaServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the multimedia services interface.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.GetMultimediaChangedHandlingNative
member.summary: Gets the multimedia change handling interface (native). Cached after first query.
member.returns: Native multimedia change handling pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.TryGetMultimediaChangedHandlingNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXMultimediaChangedHandling*@)
member.summary: Tries to get multimedia change handling; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.TryGetVideoUpscaleNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXVideoUpscale*@)
member.summary: Tries to get the native video upscale interface; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.TryGetVideoUpscale(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.VideoUpscaleInfo@)
member.summary: Tries to query video upscale info; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.TrySetVideoUpscaleEnabled(ADLXWrapper.IADLXVideoUpscale*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Tries to set video upscale enabled; returns false when the feature is unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.TrySetVideoUpscaleSharpness(ADLXWrapper.IADLXVideoUpscale*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Tries to set video upscale sharpness; returns false when the feature is unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.TryGetVideoSuperResolutionNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXVideoSuperResolution*@)
member.summary: Tries to get the native video super resolution interface; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.TryGetVideoSuperResolution(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.VideoSuperResolutionInfo@)
member.summary: Tries to query video super resolution info; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXMultimediaServicesHelper.TrySetVideoSuperResolutionEnabled(ADLXWrapper.IADLXVideoSuperResolution*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Tries to set video super resolution enabled; returns false when the feature is unsupported.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXNative
member.summary: Manual P/Invoke declarations for ADLX DLL entry points. These functions are exported from amdadlx64.dll and must be loaded dynamically.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper
member.summary: Wrapper over IADLXPerformanceMonitoringServices providing managed/native accessors.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXPerformanceMonitoringServices*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a performance monitoring helper from the native services interface.
member.param: True to AddRef the pointer for this helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetPerformanceMonitoringServicesNative
member.summary: Returns the native performance monitoring services interface owned by this helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetPerformanceMonitoringServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the performance monitoring services interface.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetGpuMetricsSupportNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*)
member.summary: Gets GPU metrics support (native pointer). Caller must dispose.
member.returns: Native GPU metrics support pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetGpuMetricsSupport(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*)
member.summary: Gets GPU metrics support DTO for a GPU.
member.returns: GPU metrics support info.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.TryGetGpuMetricsSupport(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.GpuMetricsSupportInfo@)
member.summary: Tries to get GPU metrics support info. Returns false if not supported for this GPU/system.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetCurrentGpuMetricsNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*)
member.summary: Gets current GPU metrics (native pointer). Caller must dispose.
member.returns: Native GPU metrics pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetCurrentGpuMetrics(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*)
member.summary: Gets current GPU metrics as a managed snapshot DTO.
member.returns: GPU metrics snapshot.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetCurrentSystemMetricsNative
member.summary: Gets current system metrics (native pointer). Caller must dispose.
member.returns: Native system metrics pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetCurrentSystemMetrics
member.summary: Gets current system metrics as a managed snapshot DTO.
member.returns: System metrics snapshot.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetCurrentAllMetricsNative
member.summary: Gets current system+GPU metrics (native pointer). Caller must dispose.
member.returns: Native all-metrics pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPerformanceMonitoringServicesHelper.GetCurrentAllMetrics
member.summary: Gets current system+GPU metrics as a managed snapshot DTO.
member.returns: All-metrics snapshot.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper
member.summary: Wrapper over IADLXPowerTuningServices selecting the highest available interface (if extended) and exposing change handling.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXPowerTuningServices*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a power tuning helper from the native services interface, upgrading to v1 when available.
member.param: True to AddRef the pointer for this helper.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.GetPowerTuningServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the highest available power tuning services interface.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.IsGPUConnectSupported
member.summary: Queries whether GPUConnect is supported.
member.returns: True if GPUConnect is supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.TryIsGPUConnectSupported(System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Tries to query GPUConnect support; returns false if the feature is not supported on this system.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.TryEnumerateGPUConnectGpuHandles(ADLXWrapper.AdlxInterfaceHandle[]@)
member.summary: Tries to enumerate GPUConnect-capable GPUs; returns false if not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.GetGPUConnectGpuListNative
member.summary: Returns the native GPUConnect GPU list (caller must dispose).

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.GetPowerTuningChangedHandling
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the power tuning change handling interface.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.AddPowerTuningEventListener(ADLXWrapper.PowerTuningListenerHandle.PowerTuningChangedCallback)
member.summary: Adds a power tuning change listener.
member.param: Callback invoked on power tuning changes.
member.returns: Listener handle that must be disposed to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.GetSmartShiftMax
member.summary: Returns SmartShift Max info as a managed DTO.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.GetSmartShiftMaxNative
member.summary: Gets SmartShift Max interface (native pointer). Caller must dispose.
member.returns: Native SmartShift Max pointer.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.TryApplySmartShiftMax(ADLXWrapper.SmartShiftMaxInfo)
member.summary: Tries to apply SmartShift Max; returns false when the feature is unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.GetSmartShiftEco
member.summary: Returns SmartShift Eco info as a managed DTO.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.TryApplySmartShiftEco(ADLXWrapper.SmartShiftEcoInfo)
member.summary: Tries to apply SmartShift Eco; returns false when the feature is unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.TryApplyManualPowerTuning(ADLXWrapper.IADLXManualPowerTuning*,ADLXWrapper.ManualPowerTuningInfo)
member.summary: Tries to apply manual power tuning to an existing interface; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXPowerTuningServicesHelper.TryApplyManualPowerTuning(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPUTuningServices*,ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*,ADLXWrapper.ManualPowerTuningInfo)
member.summary: Tries to apply manual power tuning via tuning services; returns false when unsupported.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.SmartShiftMaxInfo
member.summary: Represents the collected information for SmartShift Max.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.SmartShiftEcoInfo
member.summary: Represents the collected information for SmartShift Eco.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ManualPowerTuningInfo
member.summary: Represents the collected information for Manual Power Tuning.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.PowerTuningListenerHandle
member.summary: Safe handle for an unmanaged IADLXPowerTuningChangedListener backed by a managed delegate. Callbacks arrive on ADLX threads; the handle roots the delegate until disposed or explicitly removed.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSync
member.summary: Global synchronization gate for ADLX native calls. Use read locks for normal operations, write locks for init/terminate.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper
member.summary: Helper wrapper over IADLXSystem exposing per-feature service accessors and GPU enumeration.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.#ctor(ADLXWrapper.IADLXSystem*,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a system-services helper from an ADLX system pointer.
member.param: Ignored; kept for API compatibility. IADLXSystem is not ref-counted.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetSystemServicesNative
member.summary: Returns the most capable available system interface (IADLXSystem2, then 1, else base). Caller must not Release the returned pointer.
member.returns: Native system interface pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetSystemServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the system services interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native system interface.
member.exception: If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetDisplayServicesNative
member.summary: Gets the native display services interface, querying lazily if needed.
member.returns: Native display services pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If display services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetDisplayServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the display services interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native display services interface.
member.exception: If display services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.TryGetDisplayServicesNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDisplayServices*@)
member.summary: Tries to get the native display services interface without throwing when unsupported.
member.returns: True if services are available; false when not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetDisplayServices
member.summary: Creates a managed display-services helper with shared system lifetime.
member.returns: Display services helper wrapping native interfaces.
member.exception: If display/desktop services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetDesktopServicesNative
member.summary: Gets the native desktop services interface, querying lazily if needed.
member.returns: Native desktop services pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If desktop services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetDesktopServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the desktop services interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native desktop services interface.
member.exception: If desktop services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.TryGetDesktopServicesNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXDesktopServices*@)
member.summary: Tries to get the native desktop services interface without throwing when unsupported.
member.returns: True if services are available; false when not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetDesktopServices
member.summary: Creates a managed desktop-services helper with shared system lifetime.
member.returns: Desktop services helper wrapping native interfaces.
member.exception: If desktop/display services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.Get3DSettingsServicesNative
member.summary: Gets the native 3D settings services interface, querying lazily if needed.
member.returns: Native 3D settings services pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If 3D settings services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.Get3DSettingsServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the 3D settings services interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native 3D settings services interface.
member.exception: If 3D settings services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.TryGet3DSettingsServicesNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLX3DSettingsServices*@)
member.summary: Tries to get the native 3D settings services interface without throwing when unsupported.
member.returns: True if services are available; false when not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.Get3DSettingsServices
member.summary: Creates a managed 3D settings helper with shared system lifetime.
member.returns: 3D settings services helper wrapping native interfaces.
member.exception: If 3D settings services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetGPUTuningServicesNative
member.summary: Gets the native GPU tuning services interface, querying lazily if needed.
member.returns: Native GPU tuning services pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If GPU tuning services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetGPUTuningServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the GPU tuning services interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native GPU tuning services interface.
member.exception: If GPU tuning services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.TryGetGPUTuningServicesNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPUTuningServices*@)
member.summary: Tries to get the native GPU tuning services interface without throwing when unsupported.
member.returns: True if services are available; false when not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetGPUTuningServices
member.summary: Creates a managed GPU tuning helper with shared system lifetime.
member.returns: GPU tuning services helper wrapping native interfaces.
member.exception: If GPU tuning services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetPerformanceMonitoringServicesNative
member.summary: Gets the native performance monitoring services interface, querying lazily if needed.
member.returns: Native performance monitoring services pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If performance monitoring services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetPerformanceMonitoringServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the performance monitoring services interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native performance monitoring services interface.
member.exception: If performance monitoring services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.TryGetPerformanceMonitoringServicesNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXPerformanceMonitoringServices*@)
member.summary: Tries to get the native performance monitoring services without throwing when unsupported.
member.returns: True if services are available; false when not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetPerformanceMonitoringServices
member.summary: Creates a managed performance monitoring helper with shared system lifetime.
member.returns: Performance monitoring services helper wrapping native interfaces.
member.exception: If performance monitoring services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetPowerTuningServicesNative
member.summary: Gets the native power tuning services interface, querying lazily if needed.
member.returns: Native power tuning services pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If power tuning services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetPowerTuningServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the power tuning services interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native power tuning services interface.
member.exception: If power tuning services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.TryGetPowerTuningServicesNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXPowerTuningServices*@)
member.summary: Tries to get the native power tuning services without throwing when unsupported.
member.returns: True if services are available; false when not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetPowerTuningServices
member.summary: Creates a managed power tuning helper with shared system lifetime.
member.returns: Power tuning services helper wrapping native interfaces.
member.exception: If power tuning services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetMultimediaServicesNative
member.summary: Gets the native multimedia services interface, querying lazily if needed.
member.returns: Native multimedia services pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If multimedia services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetMultimediaServicesHandle
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the multimedia services interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native multimedia services interface.
member.exception: If multimedia services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.TryGetMultimediaServicesNative(ADLXWrapper.IADLXMultimediaServices*@)
member.summary: Tries to get the native multimedia services without throwing when unsupported.
member.returns: True if services are available; false when not supported.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetMultimediaServices
member.summary: Creates a managed multimedia services helper with shared system lifetime.
member.returns: Multimedia services helper wrapping native interfaces.
member.exception: If multimedia services are unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetGPUsChangedHandlingNative
member.summary: Gets the native GPU change handling interface (for GPU list/display change events).
member.returns: Native GPU change handling pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If change handling is unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetGPUsChangedHandling
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the GPU change handling interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native GPU change handling interface.
member.exception: If change handling is unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetGPUAppsListChangedHandlingNative
member.summary: Gets the native GPU applications list change handling interface (IADLXSystem2).
member.returns: Native GPU apps list change handling pointer owned by this helper.
member.exception: If the extended interface is unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetGPUAppsListChangedHandling
member.summary: Returns an AddRef'd handle to the GPU applications list change handling interface for external ownership.
member.returns: Managed handle to the native GPU apps list change handling interface.
member.exception: If the extended interface is unsupported or retrieval fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.EnumerateADLXGPUs
member.summary: Enumerates GPU facades with display/desktop helpers wired in.
member.returns: List of managed GPU facades. Callers must Dispose each GPU when finished.
member.exception: If enumeration is unsupported or fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.EnumerateDisplays
member.summary: Enumerates display facades via the display services helper.
member.returns: List of managed displays.
member.exception: If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.EnumerateDesktops
member.summary: Enumerates desktop facades via the desktop services helper.
member.returns: List of managed desktops.
member.exception: If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.EnumerateGPUsHandle
member.summary: Enumerates GPU native handles (AddRef'd for caller ownership).
member.returns: Array of native GPU interface handles.
member.exception: If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.EnumerateGPUs
member.summary: Enumerates GPU DTOs with identity and capability information.
member.returns: Sequence of GPU info records.
member.exception: If enumeration is unsupported or fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.GetGpuInfo(ADLXWrapper.IADLXGPU*)
member.summary: Builds a GPU info DTO from a native GPU pointer.
member.returns: GPU info record.
member.exception: If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.EnumerateGPUsNative
member.summary: Enumerates native GPU interfaces. Caller must dispose the returned list/entries.
member.returns: Native GPU list pointer.
member.exception: If enumeration is unsupported or fails.
If the helper has been disposed.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXSystemServicesHelper.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes cached COM pointers and releases references.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXUtils.TryQueryInterface(System.IntPtr,System.String,System.IntPtr@)
member.summary: Try QueryInterface on an ADLX interface given an IID string (wide string).

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXUtils.ReleaseInterface(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Release an ADLX interface Decrements the reference count

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXUtils.AddRefInterface(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Add reference to an ADLX interface Increments the reference count

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXUtils.MarshalString(System.Byte*)
member.summary: Helper to marshal ANSI string pointer to managed string

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXListHelpers
member.summary: Helper methods for ADLX list operations.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXListHelpers.GetListSize(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Get the size of a list.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXListHelpers.IsListEmpty(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Check if a list is empty.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.ADLXListHelpers.GetListItemAt(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get item at specific index from list. Callers must dispose the returned pointer.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ComPtr`1
member.summary: A helper struct to manage the lifetime of a COM pointer from ADLX. It automatically calls Release() when disposed.
member.typeparam: The type of the COM interface pointer.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.IComObject
member.summary: Marker interface for ADLX COM-like objects to be used with ComPtr.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.ADLXVTables
member.summary: VTable structures for ADLX COM-like interfaces These structures define the memory layout of interface vtables Based on C API patterns from ADLX samples

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.NativeAnnotationAttribute
member.summary: Defines the annotation found in a native declaration.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.NativeAnnotationAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The annotation that was used in the native declaration.

member.name: P:ADLXWrapper.NativeAnnotationAttribute.Annotation
member.summary: Gets the annotation that was used in the native declaration.

member.name: T:ADLXWrapper.NativeTypeNameAttribute
member.summary: Defines the type of a member as it was used in the native signature.

member.name: M:ADLXWrapper.NativeTypeNameAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the type that was used in the native signature.

member.name: P:ADLXWrapper.NativeTypeNameAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the type that was used in the native signature.
